ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "nlb" INTEGER /* Netherlands size */,
  "au" INTEGER /* Australia size */,
  "uk" INTEGER /* United Kingdom size */,
  "us" INTEGER /* United States size */,
  "eu" INTEGER /* European Union size */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Brand's own size system */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length in centimeters */,
  "length" REAL /* Overall length in centimeters */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the size */,
  "size_equivalency" TEXT /* Equivalent sizes across different regions */,
  "size_conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factors for sizing between regions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the clothing item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the clothing item in stock */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was last restocked */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity required to trigger restocking */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to be ordered when restocking */,
  "inventory_location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory item */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the inventory item is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country associated with the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the region */,
  "region_size_standard" TEXT /* Size standard used in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* User password (hashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inventory item involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., restock, sale, return) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity involved in the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_transactions_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventory ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
